/usr/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=thin CMakeFiles/fastsed.dir/Source/Main.cpp.o -o fastsed  libfastsed_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_iostreams.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0
